feature: Agent Control Plane Web UI Dashboard
success_criteria: FastAPI backend serves REST API for agents, health, costs, and export data
Dashboard index page shows fleet status summary with online/offline/degraded counts
Agent list page displays all agents with name, provider, status, response time, and last-seen
Cost breakdown page shows per-agent monthly costs with totals in a table
Export endpoint downloads current inventory as JSON file
Single command starts both API and static file server: acp dashboard
Responsive HTML pages with minimal CSS that work on desktop and tablet
At least 70% test coverage on all API route handlers
README updated with dashboard setup, screenshots section, and dev instructions
